bids.reasoning: At t=0.0 there is no time pressure to concede, and the opponent’s opening offer gives me the minimum value on every issue. I am targeting maximum utility with a strong opening counteroffer, while staying within the valid domain.

The opponent has moved slightly toward my preferences on issueA, but their offers are still very low utility for me, so I will make only a small concession on my lowest-weight issueD while holding firm on the more important issues.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.95 because it is still very early, so there is no need for major concessions yet. I will avoid repeating my last bid by conceding further on the lowest-weight issueD while holding firm on the higher-weight issues.

At t=0.08 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.92 while making a small concession on my lowest-weight issue.
